titleStmt.title: SII 40.209: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 209. (A.R. No. B. 3 of 1933.) Chingalput, Chingalput Taluk, Chingalput District, Tamil Nadu.

summary.p: On one of the steps leading to the moat, near the Āñjanēya temple.
This is dated Śaka 15[0]2, Vikrama, Kārttīka, śu. 12, corresponding to 1580 A.D., October 19, Wednesday.

Registers the gift of the village Meyyūr in Cheṅgalapaṭṭu-sīma situated in the amaram of Maṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja Veṅkaṭapatirājayyadēva Mahārāja as sarvamānya for the daily, monthly and car festivals of god Raghunāyaka at Cheṅgalipaṭṭupāḷem, during the administration of the division by Viśvanāthayyavāru under Daḷavāyi Tirumala Nāyanivāru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmate rāmānujāyanamaḥ
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1502
Agunēṭi vikrama saṁvatsara kā¨rtika
śu 12 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rā
japaramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī vīra
śrīraṁgarāyadēvamahārāya
lugāru vidyānagaramaṁdu vajra
siṁhāsanārūḍhulai pṛdvīsāṁbrā
jyaṁ sēyucunuṁḍagānu śrīma
ṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju veṁkaṭapati
rājayyadēvamahārājulugāri
ki Amaranāyaṁkarānaku rāyala
vāru pāliṁccina sīmalalōnu ceṁgali
paṭṭuku pratināmamaina veṁkaṭāpu
raṁ simadaḷavāyi tirumala
nāyanivāri vaśamaina viśvanātha
yyavāri pārupatyamaṁdu meyyū
ru ceṁgalipaṭṭu pāḷeṁ raghunāya
kulaku nityōtsava māsōtsava rathōtsa
vālu mōdalaina tirunāḷu naḍapavale
nani meyyūru grāmaṁ dhārāpū
¨rvakaṁgānu dhāravōsi yiciri ganaka
raghunāyaku sa¨rvamānyaṁgānu
drā¨rkamugānu dhāravōsi
Digital edition of SII 40.209 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
